headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Corning (GLW) After Its Huge 1-Year Share Price Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Corning's share price still offers value after a strong run, or if the easier gains may already have passed. At a last close of US$169.50, Corning has delivered returns of 2.1% over 7 days, 19.4% over 30 days, 86.9% year to date and 292.1% over 1 year, with 3-year and 5-year returns of 458.9% and 328.9% respectively. Recent news flow around Corning has kept investors focused on how the business is positioned within the tech sector and how that positioning...
